children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: A State shall not be immune under the 11th amendment to the Constitution of the United States from suit in Federal court for a violation of this chapter.

children.heading: Remedies
children.label: b Remedies
children.text: In a suit against a State for a violation of this chapter, remedies (including remedies both at law and in equity) are available for such a violation to the same extent as those remedies are available for such a violation in the suit against any public entity other than a State.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: Subsections (a) and (b) apply with respect to violations that occur in whole or part after .October 30, 1990
